creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: pawel
Date: Sun Feb  2 16:54:09 2014
New Revision: 342338
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/342338
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r342338/

Log:
  - Stage support [1]
  - Remove leading article from COMMENT
  
  PR:		ports/186326 [1]
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/audio/id3ed/Makefile

Modified: head/audio/id3ed/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/id3ed/Makefile	Sun Feb  2 16:52:34 2014	(r342337)
+++ head/audio/id3ed/Makefile	Sun Feb  2 16:54:09 2014	(r342338)
@@ -7,18 +7,17 @@ CATEGORIES=	audio
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_NETBSD}
 
 MAINTAINER=	turutani@scphys.kyoto-u.ac.jp
-COMMENT=	An id3 tag editor for mp3 files
+COMMENT=	Id3 tag editor for mp3 files
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 
-MAN1=		id3ed.1
-PLIST_FILES=	bin/id3ed
+PLIST_FILES=	bin/id3ed \
+		man/man1/id3ed.1.gz
 
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/id3ed ${PREFIX}/bin
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/id3ed.1 ${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/id3ed ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/id3ed.1 ${STAGEDIR}${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
